title: ranunculus macrophyllus subsp. barceloi
intro: Ranunculus macrophyllus subsp. barceloi, also known as the giant buttercup or large-leaved ranunculus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the ranunculaceae family, characterized by its large, showy flowers and broad leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. The health benefits of R. macrophyllus subsp. barceloi include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to aid in skin health and wound healing.
